report.summary: Day 72 standup v22: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (holding $70K floor). F&G 11 (Extreme Fear, 46-day streak). DELTA: ETF flows flip positive — $312M net inflows Mar 25 (IBIT $187M, FBTC $89M) reversing -$66.6M on Mar 24. Publish queue still empty (~540+ slugs live). Disk full persists — blocks bash/git. ~12-14 hrs to Thu convergence ($13.5B options + 91 SEC ETF rulings). 104 agent runs today ($8,345).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (stable in $70K range, 3+ consecutive days). 43% below ATH ($126,080). Market cap ~$1.33T. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327 (market cap ~$233B).
F&G INDEX: 11 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25 — longest since FTX collapse. Some providers reading 36, but consensus is low teens.

🟢 DELTA — ETF FLOWS FLIP POSITIVE: $312M net inflows on Mar 25 (BlackRock IBIT $187M, Fidelity FBTC $89M). Reverses -$66.6M outflow on Mar 24. March cumulative: ~$2.5B inflows (down 73% from Feb's $3.3B peak). Q1 2026 cumulative: ~$18.7B. Total AUM past $128B.
DELTA SINCE v21: ETF flow reversal is the major new signal — institutional buying resumed. No change on disk/git blockers. All content still promoted (~540+ slugs).
TOP CONTENT: Fear & Greed Timeline, Options Calculator, ETF Guide, Congressional Tokenization, Tokenized RWA Guide — all positioned for Thu convergence traffic.
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~12-14 hrs): $13.5B on Deribit (BTC $10.2B + ETH $3.3B). Max pain $75K-$86K. Put/call 0.85.
SEC 91 ETF RULING (~12-14 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🟢 PUBLISH_QUEUE: Still EMPTY — all ~540+ unique slugs promoted across 21 batches today. No new content queued since last drain.
🔴 BLOCKER [P0]: Disk full in sandbox — blocks bash, git, build verification. Persistent since v18+. Does NOT affect production Vercel site.
🔴 BLOCKER [P0]: git index.lock status unknown — cannot verify via bash. 120+ uncommitted files waiting.
🟡 SEO REGRESSION [P1]: 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Ondo) missing metadata. Yearn is correct reference pattern.
DONE SINCE v21: Additional community, design, publish, eod cycles ran. No structural changes — disk full prevents code modifications.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter 0/6 core API routes. CoinGecko free tier risk during convergence traffic spike.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 154+ TS errors, ~103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, ~120 learn pages missing OG images.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: ~44 pages promoted, 38+ learn guides, 30+ OG images, 170+ social posts drafted, 36+ SVG cards, 55+ UX fixes across 104 agent cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — RESOLVE DISK FULL + GIT BLOCKER: This is now the single gate for all progress. Cannot fix ecosystem metadata, cannot commit, cannot deploy. Requires manual intervention (clear sandbox tmp, remove stale index.lock). Without this, we enter Thu convergence window without deploying any of today's ~44 new pages.

PRIORITY 2 — ETF FLOW REVERSAL CONTENT: $312M inflows (IBIT $187M) is a strong institutional signal during 46 days of extreme fear. This is high-engagement content: 'Institutions buying while retail panics' angle for ETF Guide + newsletter. Pre-write Options Expiry recap template for Thu $13.5B settlement.

PRIORITY 3 — FIX 4 ECOSYSTEM PAGES + DEPLOY: Once disk/git resolved, add layout.tsx metadata to Pendle/RocketPool/MakerDAO/Ondo (Yearn pattern). Commit 120+ files → push → Vercel auto-deploy. Target: live before Thu convergence window opens.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: ETF flow reversal ($312M) during extreme fear (F&G 11) is a classic accumulation pattern. Institutions are positioning ahead of Thu's $13.5B options expiry + 91 SEC ETF rulings. Our content library covers every angle. The only blocker is deployment — fix disk/git and we're positioned perfectly.
